top_signals.title: Petronas Seeks Access to Turkmenistan Gas Field, Bernama Says
top_signals.summary: Malaysia’s national petroleum company Petroliam Nasional Bhd is seeking access to a major gas field in Turkmenistan, Bernama reported, citing Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Treasury Minutes progress report – June 2026
top_signals.summary: A record of the government’s progress on implementing the recommendations from the Committee of Public Accounts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ferrari diehards debate whether buying its first EV is test of loyalty
top_signals.summary: Group has banned dealers from bundling Luce sales and access to exclusive models as it seeks new clients
